user.title: Connect to cTrader
user.description:
Before setting up this integration, follow the official cTrader app creation guide at https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/creating-new-app/

You'll need to:
1. Register your application at https://openapi.ctrader.com
2. Get approval from Spotware
3. Generate an Access Token (read-only)
4. Find your Account ID in cTrader platform

Then enter your credentials below.

error.invalid_auth:
Invalid credentials. Verify:
- Access token is from an approved cTrader app
- Token hasn't expired
- Token has read-only permissions
- Account ID is correct

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
